user_story: As an employee, I want to view open vacancies, so that I can find internal opportunities to apply for
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vacancies screen; When I select Open vacancies and search; Then currently open positions are listed

user_story: As a Recruiter, I want to view closed vacancies, so that I can review positions that are no longer accepting applications
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vacancies screen; When I select Closed vacancies and search; Then closed positions are listed

user_story: As an employee, I want to search vacancies by keyword, so that I can find roles matching my interests
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vacancies screen; When I enter a keyword and click Search; Then matching vacancies are displayed

user_story: As an employee, I want to filter vacancies by location, so that I can find roles at a preferred site
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vacancies screen; When I select a Location and search; Then vacancies at that location are shown

user_story: As an employee, I want to filter vacancies by experience range using From and To years, so that I can find roles matching my seniority
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Vacancies screen; When I enter a From and To experience range and search; Then vacancies within that range are listed

user_story: As an employee, I want to reset my vacancy filters, so that I can start a new search
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Vacancies screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters are cleared
